name: Bernie Leighton
abstract: Bernie Leighton (January 30, 1921 – September 16, 1994) was an American jazz pianist. Leighton was born in West Haven, Connecticut.

works.t: Piano Sonata No. 3 in B-flat Major
Ballade No. 4 in F Minor, Op. 52
Mikrokosmos, Vol. 6: 6 Dances in Bulgarian Rhythm, BB 105, nos.148-153
Piano Sonata in A Major, D. 664

about_quotes.speaker: Terry Gibbs
about_quotes.evidence: So they hired a piano player called Bernie Leighton... Now we rehearsed all week with Ed Sullivan... Now it comes the show time and we do the playing our song
about_quotes.doc_title: Terry Gibbs interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 12, 2001 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Dick Hyman
about_quotes.evidence: And my colleagues in the piano department were Bernie Leighton, Moe Wexler early on, but then he got out of it quite early was Lou Stein, Hank Jones.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dick Hyman interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clearwater Beach, Florida, March 17, 2001 [interview 2 of 2]
